vulnerability.title: Windows SmartScreen Security Feature Bypass
vulnerability.description: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen could be bypassed allowing execution of malicious content.
vulnerability.solution: Install the latest security update from Microsoft.

vulnerability.title: Windows NTLM Elevation of Privilege
vulnerability.description: A local attacker could exploit this vulnerability to gain elevated privileges.
vulnerability.solution: Apply KB5034441 or later cumulative update.

vulnerability.title: Microsoft Office Remote Code Execution
vulnerability.description: Specially crafted Office documents could lead to remote code execution.
vulnerability.solution: Update Microsoft Office to the latest version.

vulnerability.title: RDP Exposure to Internet
vulnerability.description: Remote Desktop Protocol (port 3389) is accessible and may be exposed to brute force attacks.
vulnerability.solution: Restrict RDP access using firewall rules or use a VPN.

vulnerability.title: Information Disclosure via DNS
vulnerability.description: DNS server configuration allows zone transfers to unauthorized hosts.
vulnerability.solution: Configure DNS to restrict zone transfers to authorized servers only.
